title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・一流のライバル

text_block_list.text:
The results are in! The winner of this year's
autumn Tenno Sho is...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Let's goooo! You did it, King!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: King Halooo! Kiiing!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Not bad applause. Very fitting acclaim for one
who has reached the very top.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I lost... But I really didn't want to lose!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: King... You're the real deal.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I need to go somewhere for a moment.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Is that all right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Good job today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: King...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have something I want to say to you two. Can I
have a moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You know... There was a time when I hated the
both of you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I thought of you as obstacles, preventing me from
getting the results I deserved.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I wondered why I had to debut in the same year
as you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But now that I think about it...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to be a part of this generation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You two lit a fire under me, one stronger than I
could've ever mustered by myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Every time I thought about the possibility of
losing, I grew more and more invigorated.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If it weren't for you two, I would've never had the
opportunity to truly steel myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to both of you that I was able to finally
walk my own path. That's why...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I want to thank you for competing against me...
and for being my rivals. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: King...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's all I have to say.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess you're not always sharp, huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You think you're the only one who feels that way?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've always been grateful to you and everyone as
well. I'm so glad we all made our debut at the
same time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've become so much better by having you two as
my rivals.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful we were able to debut and race
together!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Geez. You both sure know how to set a mood.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But despite saying it yourselves, you seem to be
forgetting that...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: We all started the same year.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In other words, this ain't over. There are still more
races to come.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're not wrong. We all belong to the
same generation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
From here on, we'll keep competing, again and
again.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Which means I'll be winning again and again! First place suits me the best!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that a challenge?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It is indeed a challenge!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You two better not get discouraged by me
though! I want you to give it your all! Ohohoho!
The wind carries their laughter across the venue.

As it continues to blow, the wind lifts their voices
toward a new season, a new year together, and
beyond.

With their hopes and dreams on the line, each of
them has the chance to become a star on this
racecourse.
